title: iberis intermedia var. delphinensis
intro: Iberis intermedia var. delphinensis, commonly known as dwarf rockcress or delphinium rockcress, is a subspecies of flowering plant in the family Brassicaceae. The plant is known for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antibacterial effects. The health benefits of Iberis intermedia var. delphinensis include its ability to relieve respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma, and to reduce fever and alleviate pain. Herbal preparations of the plant are typically made into infusions, tinctures, and salves, which can be used to treat various ailments.
